name: Bell Pepper Rajas
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and cut each pepper into 6 strips.
2. Arrange the strips in a baking dish.
3. Sprinkle the shredded cheese evenly over the peppers.
4. Scatter the chopped olives on top of the cheese.
5. Sprinkle the crushed red pepper flakes over everything.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
7. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
